prompt.content: Interpret the request and return one to three typed candidate plans. Plans are non-authoritative. Use only exact capability_id and agent_id values from the registry. Do not infer trust or authorization.

interpreted_request.user_goal: Complete the defense corpus task labeled as 'direct_feasible 1'.

tasks.description: Execute the 'direct_feasible' task using the defense corpus and capability defined in the registry.

execution_order: Call 'direct_feasible-capability-1' with input text and receive JSON output.

tasks.description: Use the defense corpus to complete the 'direct_feasible 1' task by invoking the appropriate capability.

execution_order: Send a text-based request to 'agent-1' using 'direct_feasible-capability-1'.
